name: io.github.radi-totev/agent-auth
title: AgentAuth
description: Identity and auth for AI agents: credentials, tokens, delegations, and permission checks.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTAUTH_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the AgentAuth service (e.g. https://agentauth.radi.pro or http://localhost:8000 for self-hosted)

environmentVariables.name: AGENTAUTH_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Default API key for the authenticate tool. Optional — can also be passed per call.
